title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling Shopify infrastructure through flash sales, the cyclical emergence of new database companies every 15 years, and engineering practices from the 2010s. The conversation covers AI coding agents, their current limitations, and what distinguishes high-performing P99 engineers in the AI era.
